MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar May-11-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT THE RITZ-CARLTON HOTEL COMPANY, LLC's MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION

Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Tyler Bernstein, Esq. of SHEPPART MULLIN RICHTER & HAMPTON LLP, Tel:714.424.2806, for defendant/moving party;
Cody Kennedy, Esq. of MARLIN & SELTZMAN, Tel:818.991.8080, and Ashlie Fox, Esq. of the LAW OFFICE OF PETER M. HART, Tel:310.439.9298, for plaintiff/opposing party.

The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, DEFENDANT THE RITZ-CARLTON HOTEL COMPANY, LLC's MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION is taken under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court reporter: Candice Myers, CSR# 13086, Email: typerofterror@mac.com. (302/RBU)

****************************************************

After hearing, the court issued its ruling on DEFENDANT THE RITZ-CARLTON HOTEL COMPANY, LLC's MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION - Granted. Order signed. (302/RBU)
